calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Nora Nachtsheim, Esq. for Petitioner:Yvonne Ruiz, a minor, present by and thourgh Guardian ad litem Angela Vallecillo, was sworn and examined.
Eric Gale, Esq., for the defendant SF Unified School District, et al.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $19,250.00
Medical Expenses $29,540.78
Costs $4,822.76
A net balance of $31,386.46 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, 501 Castro St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled as to SFUSD's demurrer to premises liability c/a. Otherwise sustained with leave to plead statutory violations as to defendant SFUSD, and specific facts re: negligence of individual school employee defendants Buckley and Hernandez. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to amend the complaint. (PHA/301/DR) Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR #2031
